url_placeholder: Paste URL or search by keyword…
empty_hint: No downloads yet — paste a YouTube URL above and hit Fetch.
download_started: Download started ✓ — paste the next URL anytime.
playlist_count_hint: {count} videos — uncheck any you don't want.
aria2c_hint_on: Uses 16 parallel connections per file when downloading.
aria2c_hint_missing: aria2c not detected on PATH — install via `winget install aria2`. Falls back automatically.
aria2c_hint_off: aria2c not detected on PATH. Toggle is saved but ignored until aria2c is installed.
clipboard_watch: Watch clipboard — auto-fill copied YouTube URLs
minimize_to_tray: Minimize to system tray instead of quitting on close
update_already: yt-dlp is already at the latest version.
update_success: yt-dlp updated successfully. Restart Nazzil to use it.
test_no_source: No cookie source configured — pick one above first.
cookie_hint_file: Export with the 'Get cookies.txt LOCALLY' browser extension while logged into YouTube.
cookie_hint_firefox: Most reliable: stay logged into Firefox; cookies are read automatically.
cookie_hint_chromium: Tip: fully close the browser before downloading. Chromium-based browsers may fail due to v127+ cookie encryption — fall back to a cookies.txt file.
rename_hint: Tip: leave blank to use the video's original title.
conflict_body: A file with this name already exists:
conflict_rename_prompt: Rename to (leave blank to keep the proposed name):
clear_all_body:
Remove every download from the list?
Running downloads will be cancelled. Files on disk are kept.
ffmpeg_missing_body:
ffmpeg is required to merge 4K video and convert MP3.

Install on Windows:
  winget install ffmpeg

Then restart Nazzil.
row_aria2c_fallback: aria2c not found — falling back to default downloader.
err_cookie_db_locked: Browser cookie database is locked — quit the browser fully or switch to cookies.txt / Firefox.
err_cookie_db_unreadable: Couldn't read browser cookie database. Fully quit the browser (incl. tray/background) or use a cookies.txt file / Firefox.
err_auth_with_cookies: Cookies didn't work — they may be expired. Refresh your cookies.txt, or relog in the browser you selected.
err_auth_no_cookies: Login required — pick a cookie source in 🔐 account.
err_416: Partial file mismatch (416) — auto-retrying with a clean restart…
update_source_hint: Update available: {version} — running from source. Download from GitHub.
